# AsyncNode

> AsyncNode is an AI workflow automation platform. Build, connect, and run AI-powered workflows on a visual node-based canvas — with live execution updates and no boilerplate.

AsyncNode lets you orchestrate AI agents, connect any API, and automate production pipelines without writing glue code. Workflows are built by wiring nodes together on a drag-and-drop canvas and can be executed with live, node-by-node execution traces streamed to the browser.

## Key facts

- Product type: AI workflow automation platform (web application)
- Builder: visual node-based canvas (drag, drop, and connect nodes)
- Triggers: manual and webhook
- Built-in nodes: HTTP Request (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE), AI Integration, Slack message, Email (SMTP)
- Supported AI providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq
- Execution: real-time, per-node execution trace via live socket updates
- Pricing: free tier, no credit card required
- Website: https://asyncnode.builder-net.tech

## Pages

- [Home](https://asyncnode.builder-net.tech/): product overview and features
- [Documentation](https://asyncnode.builder-net.tech/docs): how to build, connect, and debug workflows
- [Sign up](https://asyncnode.builder-net.tech/signup): create a free AsyncNode workspace
- [Sign in](https://asyncnode.builder-net.tech/signin): access an existing account

## Usage

A typical AsyncNode workflow: add a Trigger node (manual or webhook), connect it to action nodes such as an AI Integration node (choose provider and model, write a prompt), an HTTP Request node (call any API), a Slack node, or an Email node, then run the workflow and watch data flow through each node in real time.
